description: Wrap your holiday discounts with a bright red bow in this classy Christmas email template. Display your top 3 best on-sale products and provide customers with a significant promotional code to encourage them to make a purchase. Customize your template with images and copy that suit your brand identity.

designer.description: I'm a Product Designer passionate about creating meaningful, relevant and inclusive solutions for people.
